title: discocalyx minor
intro: Discocalyx minor is a species of plant that belongs to the family Sapotaceae, commonly found in tropical regions of Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Discocalyx minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal benefits.
